nodes.label: Extended API routes for agents, workflows, memory, traces, etc.
Get aggregated status of knowledge sources, messaging channels, and memory.
List available agent types and running agents.
Send a message to a running agent.
Return the app-level memory backend, falling back to a fresh SQLiteMemory.
Index files from a path into memory.
Convert a Trace dataclass to a frontend-friendly dict.
Get a specific trace by ID.
Return an installable GitHub URL from a catalog or GitHub URL.
Return (clone_url, cache_key, subpath) for GitHub repo or tree URL.
Install a skill from a source (hermes, openclaw, github).
Bulk sync skills from configured sources.
Get current budget usage and limits.
Stream chat responses over a WebSocket connection.      Accepts JSON messages
Return learning system statistics across all sub-policies.
Check if a speech backend is available.
Include all extended API routers in a FastAPI app.
